title: Synthetic Expansion of Bench-Scale Experimental Data on Biosurfactant Production Using Tabular Generative Models: Trade-offs Between Fidelity, Utility, and Domain-Grounded Validation
description: Repository supporting a Computers & Chemical Engineering manuscript on PEERFIX2 no-leakage validation of tabular synthetic-data expansion for a small bench-scale biosurfactant DOE dataset. The release contains code, data descriptors, validation outputs, figures, and supplementary material for utility, proximity-risk, and domain-grounded concordance analyses. Code is released under the MIT License; data, figures, tables, and documents are released under CC BY 4.0.

creators.name: Garcia, Fernando Antonio Marçal
creators.affiliation: Centro Universitário Maurício de Nassau – Uninassau; Universidade Federal de Pernambuco

creators.name: Souza, Fabiana América Silva Dantas de

notes: Single GitHub/Zenodo release. Dual licensing: source code is MIT; data, figures, tables, manuscripts, and supplementary documents are CC BY 4.0.
